summary: High‑quality audience capture with a deep, wide soundstage; the show is praised as a straight‑fire performance.
review: Both reviewers are enthusiastic about this recording – the first gives detailed context on the 14th‑row audience placement and notes the deep, organic timbre that puts it among the best pulls of the night. The second reviewer simply exclaims “Wow!” indicating strong overall enjoyment, even though no specific musical details are mentioned.

ai_rating.rationale: Positive comments on recording clarity and ambience combined with enthusiastic (though sparse) show feedback yield a rating above average; limited detail about the musical performance keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Recorded from ~14th row center‑left using NAK300 and Sennheiser 421 mics; deep, wide soundstage with pure organic timbres; seamless pull despite multiple decks.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific set‑list comments were provided; reviewers expressed overall enthusiasm for the performance.
